name: VOC Energy Trust
business: VOC Energy Trust holds a net profits interest entitling it to receive 80% of net proceeds from the sale of oil and natural gas produced from the Underlying Properties in Kansas and Texas. The Trust does not operate the properties; the business is passive. The Trust distributes substantially all cash receipts to unitholders quarterly.

exposures.sentence: The net profits interest entitles the Trust to receive 80% of the net proceeds from the sale and production of substantially all of the interests in oil and natural gas properties in the states of Kansas and Texas.
